dataset: NCEP/NCAR Reanalysis Long Term Monthly Means

pi_items.source: setup_task.sh mandate text 'Analyst Role: Site Selection Scientist' and 'SPACE AGENCY SITE SELECTION COMMITTEE'
setup_task.sh initialization of PRES_FILE and PRATE_FILE variables
setup_task.sh REQUIRED DELIVERABLES definition and export_result.sh parsing
setup_task.sh TARGET COORDINATES section specifying 'Latitude: 22.5° S (-22.5)'
setup_task.sh TARGET COORDINATES section specifying 'Longitude: 67.5° W (-67.5)'

privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes real NCEP/NCAR Reanalysis derived datasets for surface pressure and precipitation rate downloaded from NOAA, confirming the data is not synthetic. Direct analysis of the netCDF files via Python confirms the actual dataset value for January (time index 0) surface pressure at lat -22.5, lon 292.5 (67.5° W) is exactly 629.81665 millibars (which equates to 62981.665 Pascals). For the precipitation rate, the nearest dataset grid cell to the specified coordinates is at lat -21.9044 and lon 292.5, holding a value of ~3.79853e-05 kg/m^2/s.
